title: Configure controller environment in main-controller context, then rerun real sampling retry
objective: Inside the main-controller's own execution environment, configure REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN, verify they are visible in process scope, and then rerun the real LLM sampling retry task for context slimming.
security_note: This JSON contains a live bearer token. Do not echo the token value into chat, logs, screenshots, or structured results. Only report whether the variable is present and the token length.

references.description: Retry task that previously failed only because controller env was missing.
Previous blocked result showing missing REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN in the main-controller context.

required_work.description: In the main-controller's current execution environment, set REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN from controller_env so the current task can dispatch remote work immediately.
If safe and applicable in the same Windows PowerShell environment, also persist the variables at User scope for future sessions. This is secondary; current-process visibility is the hard requirement.
Verify REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_URL is visible in process scope and REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN is visible with a non-zero length. Do not print the token value; only print length.

After controller env is verified, continue the real LLM sampling retry flow: one real worker sample, one real manager sample, and regression checks for trusted broadcast, worker evidence collection, and manager-only gate control.
Capture the real prompt composition and token totals for the worker and manager samples after slimming.
Write detailed execution logs to the main-thread log folder and publish a structured terminal result with evidence and log paths.

do_not: Do not ask the user to manually set the controller environment again for this task.
Do not echo REMOTE_CODEX_SERVER_TOKEN in chat, logs, screenshots, or structured results.
Do not stop after env setup succeeds; continue into the real sampling retry in the same task.
Do not re-implement context slimming unless real sampling proves the current code path is broken.
Do not expand this task into unrelated UI, workflow, or feature work.
acceptance: Controller environment is visible in the main-controller process scope.
At least one real worker sample executed.
At least one real manager sample executed.
Trusted broadcast / worker evidence / manager-only gate behavior did not regress.
A structured terminal result exists with evidence paths and a log path.

deliverables.description: Evidence folder for env bootstrap plus real sampling retry.
Main-thread log root for detailed logs.

working_principles: Use process-scope env as the primary unblocker because the controller must be able to dispatch in the current run.
Only report environment presence and token length, never the token value itself.
Once env is ready, continue directly into the real sampling retry instead of stopping at preflight.
Keep the task narrow: env bootstrap plus the blocked retry only.
